meta.title: AI Agent Learning
meta.description: Build AI agents from scratch with OpenAI Java SDK — 14 progressive lessons

home.hero_subtitle: Build AI agents from scratch with OpenAI Java SDK — 14 progressive lessons from a basic chat loop to multi-agent collaboration
home.core_pattern_desc: Every AI agent shares the same kernel: call the model, execute tools, feed results back. Each lesson adds one new mechanism on top.
home.learning_path_desc: 14 progressive lessons, from a simple chat loop to autonomous multi-agent execution
home.layers_desc: Five orthogonal concerns that compose into a complete agent system
home.message_flow_desc: Watch the messages array grow as the agent loop executes

sim.no_scenario: No simulation scenario available for this lesson.
sim.click_play: Click Play or Step to start the simulation.

deep_dive.no_decisions: No design decisions documented for this lesson.

timeline.title: Learning Path
timeline.subtitle: Lesson 0 to 13: Progressive Agent Design with OpenAI Java SDK

layers.title: Architectural Layers
layers.subtitle: Five orthogonal concerns that compose into a complete agent
layers.tools: What the agent CAN do. The foundation: tools give the model capabilities to interact with the world.
layers.planning: How work is organized. From simple todo lists to dependency-aware task boards shared across agents.
layers.memory: Keeping context within limits. Compression strategies that let agents work infinitely without losing coherence.
layers.concurrency: Non-blocking execution. Background threads and notification buses for parallel work.
layers.collaboration: Multi-agent coordination. Teams, messaging, protocols, and autonomous teammates that think for themselves.

compare.subtitle: See what changed between any two lessons
